  2. Classes and Interfaces

Package pages

package pages
Contains all JavaFX UI page classes for the Student QA application.

Each class in this package corresponds to a distinct screen or view. Pages interact with the model, logic, and databasePart1 layers to present data and handle user input. Most pages follow a pattern of initializing UI controls, loading data on scene display, and defining event handlers inline.

Authentication and Account Management:

  • FirstPage – Displayed on first launch to set up the initial admin account.
  • InitialAccessPage – Entry point for returning users to log in or register.
  • WelcomeLoginPage – Login screen for existing users.
  • RoleSelectionPage – Allows users to select their role on login.
  • InvitationPage – Handles invitation-based account creation.
  • ResetPasswordPage – Provides password reset functionality.
  • UpdateAccountPage – Enables users to edit their profile and credentials.

Home and Navigation:

  • AdminHomePage – Home dashboard for administrator users.
  • AdminSetupPage – Initial administrator configuration page.
  • InstructorHomePage – Home dashboard for instructor users.
  • StaffPage – Dashboard for staff users.
  • UserQAMenu – Main Q&A menu for standard users.

Question and Answer Management:

  • AnswersPage – Displays answers for a selected question.
  • EditQuestionPage – Interface for editing a submitted question.
  • EditAnswerPage – Interface for editing a submitted answer.
  • MyPostsPage – Shows questions and answers authored by the current user.
  • MyQAPage – Personal Q&A view for the current user.
  • SearchPage – Keyword-based search across questions and answers.

Review System:

  • ReviewPage – Displays reviews for a given answer.
  • EditReviewPage – Interface for editing a previously written review.
  • ReviewerProfilePage – Shows a reviewer's profile and trust rating.
  • ReviewerRequestPage – Allows users to request reviewer status.
  • TrustedReviewersPage – Interface for managing trusted reviewers.
  • RankReviewer – Displays reviewer rankings.

Messaging and Notifications:

  • MessagingPage – Private messaging interface between users.
  • MessagingPageLauncher – Standalone launcher for the messaging page.
  • NotificationsPage – Displays unread notifications for the current user.

Administration and Moderation:

  • AdminRequestsPage – Displays and manages user-submitted admin requests.
  • RequestsPage – General requests management page.
  • ModerationHandlingPage – Interface for handling flagged or moderated content.

Profiles:

  • ProfilePage – Displays and edits the current user's profile.
Author:
CSE360-Team11 Fall 2025
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminHomePage
     
    AdminRequestsPage
    AdminRequestsPage - Enhanced with category selection and notifications Manages admin requests from instructors with real-time notifications Now includes reopen functionality for both instructors and admins
    AdminSetupPage
    The class Admin setup page
    AnswersPage
    AnswersPage UI: shows answers for a question, allows submitting, editing, deleting
    EditAnswerPage
    The EditAnswerPage class allows users to edit their answers.
    EditQuestionPage
    The EditQuestionPage class allows users to edit their questions.
    EditReviewPage
    The EditReviewPage class allows users to edit their reviews.
    FirstPage
    FirstPage class represents the initial screen for the first user.
    InitialAccessPage
    InitialAccessPage builds and shows the initial access UI used for login, sign-up and password reset flows.
    InstructorHomePage
    The InstructorHomePage class represents the home page for instructors.
    InvitationPage
    InvitePage class represents the page where an admin can generate an invitation code.
    MessagingPage
     
    MessagingPageLauncher
     
    ModerationHandlingPage
     
    MyPostsPage
     
    MyQAPage
    The MyQAPage class displays questions created by the logged-in user.
    NotificationsPage
    NotificationsPage - Displays all notifications for the current user Shows admin request updates and other system notifications
    ProfilePage
     
    RankReviewer
    JavaFX GUI page that allows students to see their reviewers in a ranking order.
    RankReviewer.ReviewRow
    Represents a row in the trusted reviews display table.
    RankReviewer.TrustedReviewDisplayRow
    Represents a row for displaying detailed review information.
    RankReviewer.TrustedReviewerRow
    Represents a row in the trusted reviewer table including reviewer ID, username, name, rating, and score.
    RequestsPage
    RequestsPage - Provides interface for staff members to create requests and for administrators to manage and respond to those requests.
    ResetPasswordPage
     
    ReviewerProfilePage
     
    ReviewerRequestPage
     
    ReviewPage
    ReviewPage - shows either: - "My Reviews" (show(stage,user)) OR - "Reviews for a selected Answer" (showForAnswer(stage,user,answer))
    RoleSelectionPage
    RoleSelectionPage lets users choose which role to act as if they have multiple.
    SearchPage
     
    StaffPage
    Staff moderation dashboard: shows questions/answers/clarifications and moderation flags.
    TrustedReviewersPage
    JavaFX GUI page that allows students to manage and rate their trusted reviewers.
    TrustedReviewersPage.ReviewRow
     
    TrustedReviewersPage.TrustedReviewDisplayRow
     
    TrustedReviewersPage.TrustedReviewerRow
     
    UpdateAccountPage
    UpdateAccountPage class handles the account information update/change process for established users.
    UserQAMenu
     
    WelcomeLoginPage
    The WelcomeLoginPage class displays a welcome screen for authenticated users.
